events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need diagnose fault for concrete placement: honeycomb from missed vibration, in-service. Need decision fail because non-compliant/defective. Risk? Honeycomb can reduce durability, structural capacity depending extent/location. In-service operating asset. Need component_conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant, degraded maybe. percent_complete 100? In-service asset likely complete. value 0. confidence high. event_time 0, rate 0, order empty, workable empty, sound_source empty. findings: honeycombing due to inadequate consolidation/vibration; voids/porous concrete; reduced strength and durability; potential exposure of reinforcement. actions: investigate extent/depth, core testing, structural engineer evaluation, repair per ACI (epoxy injection, patching, removal/replacement if structural), improve vibration procedures. rationale: ACI 301/304 require adequate consolidation; honeycomb indicates missed vibration causing incomplete compaction and voids. references: ACI 301, ACI 304. Need ensure JSON valid.
